text: Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement. On October 22, 2025, Acme Corporation (the "Company") entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger (the "Merger Agreement") with TechCorp Inc. ("Parent") and Sigma Merger Sub, Inc. ("Merger Sub"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Parent. Pursuant to the Merger Agreement, Merger Sub will be merged with and into the Company (the "Merger"), with the Company surviving as a wholly owned subsidiary of Parent. Under the terms of the Merger Agreement, each share of the Company's common stock outstanding immediately prior to the effective time of the Merger (other than certain excluded shares) will be converted into the right to receive $52.00 per share in cash (the "Merger Consideration"), without interest.

extractions.extraction_text: entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger (the "Merger Agreement") with TechCorp Inc. ("Parent") and Sigma Merger Sub, Inc. ("Merger Sub"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Parent

text: Item 8.01 Other Events. On January 15, 2026, the Company received a request for additional information and documentary material (the "Second Request") from the Federal Trade Commission (the "FTC") in connection with the FTC's review of the proposed merger of the Company with Parent pursuant to the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act of 1976, as amended ("HSR Act"). The issuance of the Second Request extends the waiting period under the HSR Act until 30 days after the Company and Parent have each substantially complied with the Second Request, unless that period is terminated sooner. The Company and Parent expect to cooperate fully with the FTC and intend to work to complete the merger as expeditiously as possible.

extractions.extraction_text: received a request for additional information and documentary material (the "Second Request") from the Federal Trade Commission (the "FTC") in connection with the FTC's review of the proposed merger
